title: Black Create ModPack
description: A Modpack Based on Create and other technology mods
body:
# BlackTechnic ModPack

![techlogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e7f71156aaa62459c3d9bab5db63e1f81e7bc1.png)

---

Welcome to BlackTechnic ModPack, a Minecraft modpack designed for players who love exploration, advanced technology, and automation. This modpack is built around the powerful Create mod and includes a wide range of complementary mods to enhance your Minecraft experience. Explore better dungeons, harness the power of technology, and conquer challenging environments with this carefully curated selection of mods.

Features

Tech and Automation: Utilize the Create mod and its various addons, along with Applied Energistics 2 and Industrial Revolution, to build complex machinery, automate processes, and manage resources efficiently.
Enhanced Exploration: YUNG's Better series overhauls Minecraft's vanilla structures, making exploration more rewarding and dangerous.
Visual Enhancements: Experience Minecraft with beautiful shaders using Iris Shaders, and enjoy the added immersion of dynamic lighting with LambDynamicLights.
Quality of Life Improvements: A variety of mods, including Roughly Enough Items (REI) and Mouse Wheelie, ensure that your gameplay is smooth and enjoyable.
Installation Instructions

Credits

Mod Authors: Thank you to all the mod authors for creating these amazing mods.
Community: Thanks to the Minecraft modding community for their continuous support and creativity.
Support

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please feel free to open an issue on the Modrinth project page.

Enjoy your adventure with the BlackTechnic ModPack!
